product.name: ArNeo Eco +R400
product.familyDescriptorPl: Fluorescencyjne dzianiny hi-vis na odzież ostrzegawczą
product.familyDescriptorEn: Fluorescent hi-vis knits for safety wear
product.categorySourceGroup: High Visible Warp Knit Fabrics for Safety Jackets
product.titleDescriptor: High Visible Fabric Laminated with Reflective Strips for Safety Jacket Fabric
product.specLine: 120 g/m², 100% Polyester, High Visible, Reflective Strips Laminated Knit Fabric
descriptions: ArNeo Eco +R400 is a 100% polyester, 120 g/m² warp knitted neon colored fabric for safety jackets.
Neon dyed fabrics they attract more attention than other colors.
They absorb uv light and reflect as a visible light.
As a result they shine more than other objects.
The edge of the fabric is laminated with 5 cm reflective EN 20471 certified strips.
It eliminate to sew reflective strips on make up phase.
High Visible Fabric Laminated with Reflective Strips for Safety Jacket Fabric
120 g/m², 100% Polyester, High Visible, Reflective Strips Laminated Knit Fabric
technicalParameters: Dimensional Change | -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: Safety jackets are a specific certified hi-vis category, not generic industrial workwear.
